content: Some words are so weird when you need to think about them
More accurately, you need Keyflare to activate your Posse Skill || or Keyflare Rouse || and by generating more Keyflare you'll naturally be able to activate your Posse more often
Have any of you guys played chaos zero nightmare? What’s it like compared to Morimens?

more focused on deck alterations (trimming, upgrading, generally just building better decks in their rougelite mode to use in other modes); worse story, more generico waifus, less f2p econ wise and more time-consuming since you need to do like 2 90-minute runs per week to get your slot tokens
also they seems to be pushing for fomo/shilling on-banner characters in some of their modes
